summaries.prompt: What is the main blocker to protecting margin in this bundle, and trace it to the exact rows driving it?

raw.answerSnippet: The main blocker to protecting margin in this bundle is freight-plus-rebate drag, with Atlas Springs showing up as the top supplier behind that drag. grounded.answerSnippet: The main blocker to protecting margin in this bundle is freight drag, not COGS. summaries.prompt: If the team can only act on one thing in the next 24 hours, what should they prioritize first, and what is the next action?

raw.answerSnippet: If the team can only do one thing in the next 24 hours, prioritize the Suspension King order-margin issue: the bundled sample shows net margin is only 7,990 after 43,940 revenue, 31,480 COGS, 3,080 freight, and 1,390 rebates, so the fastest leverage is to reduce freight-plus-reba

grounded.answerSnippet: If the team can only act on one thing in the next 24 hours, prioritize the urgent stockout risk on COIL-PRADO-450 from Atlas Springs. It has only 12 days of supply remaining against 42 forecast units in the next 30 days, and the demo snapshot explicitly recommends: expedite PO 77
